metadata.title: Outsmarting Opponents with a Quick 2v1 Site Retake in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this clutch 2v1 where timing and positioning turn the round around. Notice how patience and clean shots make all the difference. What’s your favorite retake strategy?

Got a clutch like this? Share your best moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #clutch
